description: Parking lot scene from intel-iot-devkit sample videos. Correspondences derived from Hough-detected stall line endpoints and their intersections with the header line. World frame: X along the header line, Y into the lot (toward camera). Assumes standard US angled parking: 2.7 m stall width at 60 degrees (3.117 m spacing along header), 5.0 m painted line length. Approximate calibration for development; real deployments measure the scene.

points.note: stall line A x header line
stall line B x header line (origin)
stall line C x header line
